Sarah.description: A young governess recently hired to care for the two orphaned children in the mansion.

Mr. Blackwood.description: The mysterious, tall owner of the mansion with piercing blue eyes.

Dr. Chen.description: An elderly physician who has served as the family doctor for decades.

The mansion on the hill.description: An isolated, old house where the characters have gathered.

Emily.description: One of the children who claims there is a ghost in the attic.

James.description: One of the children who claims there is a ghost in the attic.

The estate garden.description: An overgrown area on the property where Sarah begins her exploration.

The greenhouse.description: An old building at the far end of the property where the locket was found.

The house.description: The main residence where the nursery and attic are located.

The attic.description: A room in the house rumored by the children to be haunted.

Golden locket.description: A small piece of jewelry with a strange engraved symbol discovered in the greenhouse.

Eliza.description: Mr. Blackwood's sister who disappeared ten years ago.

The locket.description: A mysterious piece of jewelry Sarah found in the greenhouse that belonged to Eliza.

The woods.description: An area near the house where mysterious lights have been spotted at night.
